Hold thy purse close: a coin not spent today strengthens tomorrow's treasury.
If thy daily spending climbs above thy rolling average, slow thy hand before dusk.
A planned deed confirmed early keeps forecasted perils from becoming real ones.
When a peril nears, postpone luxuries and fortify thy essential coin first.
Small savings, repeated often, forge the strongest castle walls.
Name thy expenses clearly; what is measured is mastered.
If gold runs low, review unplanned outgoings before blaming fate.
A wise steward checks tomorrow's prophecies before today's market stroll.
Celebrate frugal victories, for discipline grows where praise is given.
Missed plans are not failures, only signals to adjust thy strategy.
